content: Binary entry point in cmd/vn/main.go (not cmd/main.go) so go install produces 'vn' binary name

name: note-path-no-extension
description: Note.Path stored without .md extension. CLI adds .md when resolving to filesystem

name: sort-by-mtime-default
description: query command supports --sort flag (mtime|title|path), defaults to mtime desc. Backlinks also sorted by mtime desc. Sorting happens in internal/cli/ after filtering, before output.
